title: Question about OA 21 24 pre Renewal on Genesis 0X LD
display_title: Question about OA 21 24 pre Renewal on Genesis 0X LD
wikitext: []: Question about OA 21-24 (pre-Renewal) on Genesis 0:X LD             Quote Post by svenge » Wed Aug 03, 2011 6:49 pm I've got a question about the OA Episodes (21-24) found on the Genesis 0:X LD and Second Impact Box DVD box #2. Are the episodes shown as straight broadcast versions, or are they based on the cleaned-up home video footage used (and extended upon) in the NPC versions and then down-edited to match the scenes used in the original broadcast versions (as was done again in the later Renewal set)?

Article: Question about OA 21 24 pre Renewal on Genesis 0X LD
[]: Question about OA 21-24 (pre-Renewal) on Genesis 0:X LD             Quote Post by svenge » Wed Aug 03, 2011 6:49 pm I've got a question about the OA Episodes (21-24) found on the Genesis 0:X LD and Second Impact Box DVD box #2. Are the episodes shown as straight broadcast versions, or are they based on the cleaned-up home video footage used (and extended upon) in the NPC versions and then down-edited to match the scenes used in the original broadcast versions (as was done again in the later Renewal set)?
